# @bug-on/md3-react
> MD3 Expressive Design System for React + Tailwind v4 + Framer Motion.

## Core Objective
To provide a high-fidelity implementation of Material Design 3 (Expressive) with a focus on fluid shape-morphing animations and dynamic color themes.

## Key Concepts
- **MD3 Expressive**: Uses "Springs" instead of "Durations". Focuses on shape morphing (e.g., Pill -> Rounded Square).
- **Polymorphism**: Most components support `asChild` via Radix UI `Slot`.
- **Theme System**: Driven by CSS variables (`--m3-*`). Use `MD3ThemeProvider` to manage light/dark/system modes.
- **Animations**: Powered by `motion/react` (Framer Motion). Uses expressive springs (bounce: 0.45+) for a natural "pop" feel. Supports custom transitions via props.

## Package Map
- `packages/react`: Core UI components.
- `packages/tailwind`: Tailwind v4 plugin for MD3 colors and utilities.
- `packages/tokens`: raw CSS/JS tokens for colors, shapes, and motion.

## Core Implementation Pattern
```tsx
import { Button, Icon } from "@bug-on/md3-react";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <Button 
      variant="toggle" 
      selected={true} 
      icon={<Icon name="check" />}
    >
      Active State
    </Button>
  );
}
```

## Component Categories
The library includes 30+ standardized components across 6 categories:
- **Action**: Buttons, FABs, Icon Buttons, Button Groups.
- **Navigation**: App Bars, Navigation Bar/Rail, Tabs, Drawers.
- **Input**: Text Fields, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Sliders, Search.
- **Feedback**: Dialogs, Menus, Tooltips, Snackbars, Progress/Loading.
- **Display**: Cards, Chips, Badges, Icons, Typography.
- **Layout**: Scroll Area, Dividers.
